title: Summer BBQ & Bocce
cityArea: Riverside, near the big oak grove
description: Our yearly cookout is back! Burgers and sausage on the grill, a hard-fought bocce tournament, and plenty of shade. Bring the whole gang.

details.label: Bring
details.value: A side dish or dessert to share (we've got the mains & drinks)

details.label: Parking
details.value: Free lot off Maple Ave; overflow street parking

host: Hosted by the Maria & Tony side

title: Nonna Petrillo's 80th Birthday
exactAddress: 482 Poplar Street, Bay Ridge (please keep private)
description: We're throwing Nonna a big surprise for her 80th! Details are still coming together — save the idea of a late-summer Sunday and we'll confirm the date soon.

details.label: Dress
details.value: Sunday best — Nonna loves seeing everyone dressed up

details.label: Bring
details.value: Your favorite photo of Nonna for the memory board

details.label: Note
details.value: It's a SURPRISE 🤫 — please don't mention it to Nonna

title: Baptism Celebration for Baby G.
venue: St. Rocco's Church, then Rosa's Trattoria
description: Join us as we welcome the newest little Petrillo into the family. Mass at 11, followed by a celebration lunch nearby.

details.label: Kids
details.value: Very welcome — there's a kids' table at the lunch

details.label: Parking
details.value: Public garage on Mott St; street parking is tight

host: Hosted by the Tony & Sofia side

title: Petrillo Family Reunion 2025
description: Four generations, one very long table, and Nonna's famous braciole. Our biggest reunion yet.

photos.alt: The whole Petrillo family gathered under the trees for a group photo
Long tables set for the reunion lunch in the grove
Cousins playing a game on the grass

recap: What a day. We ate for six hours straight, the kids ran wild until sundown, and Uncle Sal finally won the bocce cup after a decade of trying. Already counting down to next year.
